title: Collomia larsenii
taxonomy: Collomia larsenii is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The classification of Collomia larsenii includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Magnoliophyta, class as Magnoliopsida, order as Ericales, family as Polemoniaceae, genus as Collomia, and species as C. larsenii. This plant is a perennial herb with a taproot and an upright habit. Collomia larsenii is a member of the Polemoniaceae family, which includes other flowering plants commonly known as gilias and phlox.
